notes: Most common direct replacement. Works for host<->device and device<->device in seeds.

hip: hipLaunchKernel or hip kernel launch syntax (hip<<< >>>)
notes: hipify-clang usually handles, but sometimes needs explicit hipLaunchKernel for complex cases or when using dynamic parallelism.
source: baseline seeds + common AMD migration reports

notes: Direct 1:1 in most cases. Still works under HIP.

hip: fmaf, __fmaf_rn (same) or hip specific fast math
notes: Usually no change needed. For max performance on MI300X consider hip specific intrinsics later.
Reduction seed uses tree reduction + possible atomics. HIP atomicAdd on global memory works similarly but watch for performance on gfx942.
Critical compile flag for MI300X. Always use gfx942 (or appropriate) in hipcc for this hackathon hardware.
